## Checklist
- [ ] Ran the gate from `app/`: `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm verify:content && pnpm build`
- [ ] **Adding a question?** It self-grades green via `pnpm verify:content` (runs on the real engine).
- [ ] Updated docs / `ROADMAP.md` if the change warrants it.
